pre_shrink_explanation: raw sheet 1500x3000 pre-shrunk by inset = margin − half_spacing = 5 − 4 = 1 mm on every side (solver sheet [1.000,1499.000]x[1.000,2999.000]). Aligning the spacing-offset contour flush to the shrunk edge places the physical contour at exactly margin = 5 mm from the raw edge.
